name: Volumetric Lithograph
description: Psychedelic linocut terrain — forward-dollying flight over an infinite audio-reactive landscape. v6 density/rate/attack drivers: terrain amp = 0.30·coactivation + 0.50·onset_density + 0.25·(attack−1), three AGC-surviving primitives that track structural intensity rather than normalised amplitude. Accent fires on drum onsets or any stem's sharp transients; palette hue tracks energy-weighted stem composition. No atmospheric fog (printmaking has no aerial perspective).
author: Matt
_comment_scene_fog: 0 disables fog (was actually MAXIMUM fog in pre-v3 due to PresetDescriptor+SceneUniforms fallback bug; fixed alongside v3)
